title: Media File ID3 Tag Analysis Flow
domain: WordPress ID3 media metadata analysis (getID3 v1.9.22)
key_classes: getid3_handler — abstract base for all format/tag modules
getid3_exception — extends Exception, wraps fatal errors
flow_construction: Check PHP version >= 5.3.0 → startup_error if fails
Parse ini memory_limit (M/G suffix) → startup_error if < 4MB, startup_warning if < 12MB
Check safe_mode, mbstring.func_overload bitmask 2 → startup_error if set
Check magic_quotes_runtime / magic_quotes_gpc (PHP < 7.4) → startup_error if on
[Windows only] Resolve GETID3_HELPERAPPSDIR with 8.3 path conversion
ELSE: handler ready for analysis calls
flow_analyze: ENTRY: getID3::analyze($filename, $filesize=null, $original_filename='', $fp=null)
Call openfile($filename, $filesize, $fp)
openfile: check startup_error → throw getid3_exception
openfile: emit each startup_warning via warning()
openfile: init $this->info array (filesize, filepath, filename, filenamepath, avdataoffset=0, avdataend, error=[], warning=[], tags=[], comments=[], encoding)
openfile: reject remote URLs (ht/ftp) → throw getid3_exception
openfile: accept existing $fp resource OR fopen($filename,'rb') → throw if fails
openfile: IF option_max_2gb_check → fseek SEEK_END + ftell to detect >2GB → warning or exception
openfile: return true
IF openfile fails → return $this->info (with error)
FOR EACH tag type in [id3v2, id3v1, apetag, lyrics3]:
IF option_tag_{name} enabled: include_module('tag.{name}') → new getid3_{name}($this) → tag->Analyze()
Catch getid3_exception → rethrow
Set avdataoffset from id3v2 tag_offset_end (if present)
Set avdataend from id3v1/apetag/lyrics3 tag_offset_start (min)
IF !option_tag_id3v2: fseek(0) + fread(10) to detect ID3v2 header presence → update avdataoffset
fseek(avdataoffset) + fread(32774) → $formattest buffer
GetFileFormat($formattest, $filename) — pattern-match first bytes against GetFileFormatArray()
IF no format matched → fclose + error('unable to determine file format') → return info
Check fail_id3 constraint (ERROR/WARNING) for illegal ID3 tags on format
Check fail_ape constraint (ERROR/WARNING) for illegal APE tags on format
Set info['mime_type']
Check module file exists → error if missing
Check iconv/mb_convert_encoding required → error if absent
include_once module file (module.{group}.{module}.php)
Instantiate 'getid3_{module}'($this) — concrete getid3_handler subclass
Copy matching 'options_{group}_{module}_*' properties into module instance
$class->Analyze() — format-specific parsing
unset($class); fclose($this->fp)
IF option_tags_process: HandleAllTags() — copy/charset-convert tags to info['tags'] and info['tags_html']
IF option_extra_info: ChannelsBitratePlaytimeCalculations(), CalculateCompressionRatioVideo(), CalculateCompressionRatioAudio(), CalculateReplayGain(), ProcessAudioStreams()
IF option_md5_data AND NOT (option_md5_data_source AND md5_data_source set): getHashdata('md5')
IF option_sha1_data: getHashdata('sha1')
CleanUp() — remove empty keys, deduplicate error/warning arrays
Catch Exception → error('Caught exception: ...')
RETURN $this->info
flow_analyze_string: Save: saved_avdataoffset, saved_avdataend, saved_filesize from getid3->info
Call abstract Analyze() — operates on string via overridden fread/fseek/ftell/feof/fgets
Restore: info['avdataoffset'], info['avdataend'], info['filesize'] to saved values
flow_save_attachment: ELSE IF option_save_attachments === ATTACHMENTS_INLINE (true): fseek($offset) + fread($length) → attachment = raw binary string
ELSE (directory path string): build $dest = dir/name[.ext]; fopen($dest,'wb'); fseek($offset); loop fread(buffersize)+fwrite until bytesleft==0; fclose; attachment = $dest path
ON Exception: fclose+unlink $dest if created; attachment=null; warning('Failed to extract attachment...')
io_dispatch: getid3_handler::fread($bytes): IF data_string_flag → substr(data_string, pos, bytes); pos+=bytes. ELSE → loop fread(fp) to handle partial reads
getid3_handler::fseek($bytes, $whence): IF data_string_flag → update data_string_position per SEEK_SET/CUR/END. ELSE → fseek(fp) + throw if non-zero return
getid3_handler::ftell(): IF data_string_flag → data_string_position. ELSE → ftell(fp)
getid3_handler::feof(): IF data_string_flag → position >= length. ELSE → feof(fp)
getid3_handler::fgets(): custom CR/LF/CRLF handler for string or fp
error_warning_handling: getID3::error($message): calls CleanUp(), appends to info['error'][], returns info array
getID3::warning($message): appends to info['warning'][], returns true
getid3_handler::error($text): appends to getid3->info['error'][], returns false
Fatal conditions throw getid3_exception (extends Exception) — caught at analyze() top level
key_options: option_tags_process (bool) — copy tags to info['tags'] with charset conversion
option_tags_html (bool) — copy tags to info['tags_html'] as HTML entities
option_extra_info (bool) — calculate bitrate, channels, playtime, compression, replaygain
option_max_2gb_check (bool|null) — guard against 32-bit PHP file size limit
module_handler_subclasses: getid3_mp3, getid3_flac, getid3_ogg, getid3_ac3, getid3_dts, getid3_mpc, getid3_wavpack (audio)
All extend abstract getid3_handler and implement Analyze()
key_decisions: [startup] PHP version / memory / safe_mode / mbstring checks before any analysis
[analyze] Tag modules run BEFORE format detection to set avdataoffset/avdataend boundaries
[analyze] ID3v2 header optionally detected even when tag parsing disabled (for offset calc)
[analyze] Format identified by binary byte-pattern match (32KB read); fallback by filename extension for mp3/mpc/cue
[analyze] fail_id3/fail_ape per-format constraints raise ERROR (fatal) or WARNING
[saveAttachment] Three modes: discard / inline binary / write to disk directory
[fread/fseek] Dual-mode dispatch: string buffer vs file pointer, with 2GB boundary guard
